witness_prompts: Where do you notice the motion of {verb_1} in the text?
What detail in the scene invites careful attention today?
How does the passage ask you to witness without fixing?
What would it mean to stay present with what is {verb_2}?
prayer_frames: God of presence, stay close as we witness.
Let what is {verb_1} be seen with clarity and care.
Give us grace to respond without haste.
safety_notes_append: Keep language invitational and grounded in the text.
